signup.title: Sign up
signup.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
signup.checkEmail: A confirmation email was sent. Please click the link in the email, then sign in.

errors.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in
errors.emailTaken: Email is already registered. Try signing in
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute
errors.network: No internet connection. Try again when back online
errors.appleUnavailable: Sign in with Apple isn't available on this device
errors.appleNoToken: Apple didn't return a valid token. Try again
errors.appleFailed: Sign in with Apple failed. Try again
errors.googleNotConfigured: Sign in with Google isn't configured. Contact support
errors.googleNoToken: Google didn't return a valid token. Try again
errors.googlePlayServices: Google Play Services required. Please update your device
errors.googleFailed: Sign in with Google failed. Try again
